hero_desc_html: Graduate student in AI & Data Engineering at CUT. Passionate about artificial intelligence, data analysis and innovative applications. Based in Limassol, Cyprus.
edu2_title: BSc: Communication and Internet Studies – Information Technology
exp1_body: Analyzed product and business data using E-Soft, supported costing processes, and used AI tools to improve data analysis, reporting, and basic marketing activities.
exp2_body: Department of Communication and Internet Studies, CUT. Website development and dissemination of research results.
exp3_body: Creation and programming of a website. Full design, development and delivery of a complete web project.
exp4_body: Customer service, garden landscaping, tree and flower planting, gravel work and artificial grass installation.
res1_title: Config-only Multi-Agent Crypto Market Making with CrewAI & Ollama
res1_body: Supervisor: Dr. Sotirios Chatzis. Agent architecture design, experiments with liquidity/risk profiles and performance evaluation with PnL, inventory risk & execution quality.
res2_title: Tech Brands on Instagram: A Multimodal Computational Approach for Content Analysis
res2_body: Image & text analysis of the top 20 technology brands using sentiment analysis, emotional analysis and topic modeling on multimodal data.
res3_body: Role: Research Associate. Website development for presentation and dissemination of research results. Digital content management.
res4_title: Differential Behavior of Male & Female Users on Social Media – MEPs
res4_body: Development of Python software for big data analysis. Exploration of gender differences in MEPs' social media post content.
res5_body: Director, Screenwriter, Producer & Editor. History of the Carnival through interviews and archives from the Pattichio Historical Archive of Limassol.
cert1: Practical Workshop – VERITAS-AI Project | EmpowerPath (EU Co-funded)
